title: Offline Lab Repository Root Index
description: index.json served at the repo root. Discovery document only — no package entries. Lists available signing keys and per-arch index URLs. See docs/specs/repository.md.

spec_version.description: Schema version. Always '1' for this version of the spec.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

keys.description: All currently valid signing certificates. At least one build key and one index key must have active: true.

key_id.description: Cert fingerprint: SHA-256 of DER-encoded cert, hex.

type.description: 'build' = signs .roothash.p7s for packages (lives on build machine, never on repo server). 'index' = signs index.json.p7s for each arch index (lives on repo host). See docs/specs/security-model.md.

cert_url.description: Relative URL to the public cert file in keys/. Relative to repo base_url.

active.description: True if this key is currently used to sign new packages or indexes. During rotation, old key has active: false with expires_at set.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry date for a retiring key. appctl removes the cert once all packages signed by it have been updated and this date has passed. Null for active keys.

index_url.description: Relative URL to the per-arch package index. Relative to repo base_url.
